texto: How many books on manifesting will you buy before your realize that all you have manifested is a bunch of useless books? Do more than just wish
autor: CREATE! Do more than just want
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de CREATE! Do more than just want que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “How many books on manifesting will you buy before your realize that all you have manifested is a …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, act, books, com foco em reflexao.
